name: Jimmie Jewel Neal
researcher_question: Who were the maternal grandparents of Jimmie Jewel Neal (born 10 July 1884 in Hillsboro, Hill, Texas, died 7 March 1938 in Carlsbad, Eddy, New Mexico) — the parents of her mother, Martha J Wood?
notes: Maternal grandparents (Manley Madison Wood and Martha Patsey Ford, both b. Spartanburg, South Carolina, d. 1863 in Blount County, Alabama) are documented on the compiled FamilySearch tree for Martha J Wood and corroborated by an 1860 census entry showing M M Wood and Martha Wood as a household in Blount, Alabama.
